meaning: [军]Armored Artillery Howitzer,装甲榴弹炮;[军]Advanced Attack Helicopter,先进攻击直升机
examples: Aah! The witch will be burned!
It's like a big, round eye! Aah!
Think your guests are going to ooh and aah over your shining, new, professional-grade, dual-fuel Viking range?
Between 2005 and 2007, before she launched her WAT-AAH!
